name: On The Fringe
about: On The Fringe is an indoor golf facility located at Fox Run Golf Course in Laramie, Wyoming. It offers guests access to several golf simulators featuring the latest technologies, allowing players to learn or improve their skills regardless of the season or weather. The facility features high-definition graphics on large 10' x 14' impact screens. On The Fringe caters to a wide range of golfers, from seasoned pros to complete beginners, and provides a social environment with areas to relax while enjoying food and drinks. It also serves as a venue for leagues, tournaments, and special events.
why_golfers_like_it: Large 10' x 14' HD impact screens for an immersive visual experience
Full bar with a large selection of local craft beers
Ability to play in any weather condition, rain or shine
Availability for leagues, tournaments, and special events
Welcoming environment for golfers of all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Appetizers available for consumption in the relaxation areas.
Full bar with a large selection of local craft beers.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is not explicitly stated on the website, but it is common practice at indoor golf facilities. It's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience, though rentals may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers a full bar with locally crafted beers and appetizers for purchase on-site. Bringing outside food and drinks is not mentioned as an option.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time. The duration can vary depending on the number of players, simulator software, and pace of play, but a typical 18-hole simulation can take anywhere from 1.5 to 3 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is described as enjoyable for players of all ages and skill levels, and mentions it's a great fit for parties and events, which suggests a family-friendly environment.
